---
title: "Executive Briefs"
subtitle: "Single-page leadership summaries of UIAO capability areas"
doc-type: section-landing
audience: "Agency CIO · CISO · modernization sponsors"
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
aspirational: true
---

# Executive Briefs {.unnumbered}

Single-page summaries for agency leadership. Each brief answers four
questions about one capability area:

1. **What it is** — the capability in one paragraph.
2. **Why it matters** — the governance or mission problem it solves.
3. **What UIAO delivers** — shipped and target behavior.
4. **What is still target vs. shipped** — honest adoption posture.

## Pages in this section

| Slug | Topic | Canon anchor |
|---|---|---|
| `governance-os-overview` | The UIAO Governance OS in one page | `src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml` |
| `drift-engine-overview` | Drift-detection capability brief | `docs/docs/16_DriftDetectionStandard.qmd` |
| `evidence-fabric-overview` | Provenance and evidence pipeline brief | `docs/docs/15_ProvenanceProfile.qmd` |
| `zero-trust-overview` | Zero-trust identity model brief | `src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-008-zero-trust-identity.md` |
| `modernization-overview` | End-to-end modernization program brief | `docs/docs/06_ProgramVision.qmd` |
